audio_clips.text: Swaddle Your Baby Like a Pro

A man in a teal shirt stands by a changing table, ready to demonstrate swaddling. He unfolds a large white cloth with colored stripes, over which a baseball field diagram appears, illustrating the 'baseball method.' Holding a baby dressed in green, he gently places it on the changing table, aligning it with the diagram. He begins wrapping the cloth around the baby using the baseball method, carefully tucking it under for a snug fit. After securing the baby comfortably, he checks the swaddle, ensuring the baby is secure with a pacifier in its mouth. Satisfied, he steps back slightly.

video_name: Swaddle Your Baby Like a Pro   baseball method
